title: Soteria
description: DBSV Addon: Weapons to save Granbury. Salvation for the forgotten.
body:
This addon for [Dream Burst Spirit Vector](https://modrinth.com/mod/spirit-vector) introduces the *Curse Breaker*: a kind of spear modelled after those used by the Old Granbury Watch to defend the city in its darkest days, when the old ones cast shadow o'er the Valley Lemniscate.

### Usage

1. Obtain the Curse Breaker (Currently by command: `soteria:soteria`)
2. Build poise by using your Spirit Vector as normal.
3. Hold right mouse to charge, consuming poise over time.
4. Release to fire a hitscan attack with damage proportional to charge.
